Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class LegibilityResult

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.AbstractResult
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.LegibilityResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
IResult
public class LegibilityResult extends AbstractResult
This class represents a result of a well-formedness check on a formula.

It contains a list of already encountered free identifiers and a list of already encountered bound identifiers in the current formula.

  • Method Details

    • hasFreeIdent

      public boolean hasFreeIdent(String name)
      Returns true if this result contains the given name in the free identifiers collected so far.
      Parameters:
      name - identifier name to search through free identifiers
      Returns:
      true if this result contains the given name

    • hasBoundIdentDecl

      public boolean hasBoundIdentDecl(String name)
      Returns true if this result contains the given name in the bound identifier declarations collected so far.
      Parameters:
      name - identifier name to search through bound identifier declarations.
      Returns:
      true if this result contains the given name

    • getExistingFreeIdentifier

      public FreeIdentifier getExistingFreeIdentifier(String name)
      Returns the free identifier with the given name.

      Method hasFreeIdent(String) can be used to check the existence of that free identifier.

      Parameters:
      name - identifier name to search
      Returns:
      the free identifier with the given name or null if not found.

    • getExistingBoundIdentDecl

      public BoundIdentDecl getExistingBoundIdentDecl(String name)
      Returns the bound identifier declaration with the given name.

      Method hasBoundIdentDecl(String) can be used to check the existence of that bound identifier declaration.

      Parameters:
      name - identifier name to search
      Returns:
      the bound identifier declaration with the given name or null if not found.

    • addFreeIdent

      public void addFreeIdent(FreeIdentifier ident)
      Adds the given free identifier to the list of known free identifiers
      Parameters:
      ident - a free identifier to add

    • addBoundIdentDecl

      public void addBoundIdentDecl(BoundIdentDecl ident)
      Adds the given bound identifier declaration to the list of known bound identifier declarations
      Parameters:
      ident - a bound identifier declaration to add
